name: io.github.krutftw/fetchmux
description: Self-hosted retrieval router for AI agents: budgets, provider routing, route receipts.

environmentVariables.name: FETCHMUX_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the self-hosted FetchMux gateway.

environmentVariables.name: FETCHMUX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer key for the gateway's protected routes.
